tests.name: pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null when the call does not contain any arguments node or string specifier
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports builds a dynamic import relation from named-children fallbacks and interpreted string nodes
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null when the callee is not require
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports builds a commonjs import relation for require calls even when the path does not resolve
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null without throwing when the callee fallback is missing
